title: Antibiotics for treatment of sore throat in children and adults
notes: PMID 34881426; Cochrane update of PMID 24190439. Review includes children and adults, many older trials, and reports symptom and complication outcomes. Baseline complication risk and diagnostic context limit transfer to current Australian self-care. The live PubMed record contains author disclosures, recorded in the module funding/conflicts artefact; trial-level funding and conflicts still require reviewer/full-text confirmation.
